message.content:
@startuml
actor ListingController
participant FixPriceListingMapper
participant Database
participant "allListings: ArrayList<FixPriceListing>" as allListings

ListingController -> ListingController: doGet()
ListingController -> FixPriceListingMapper: readList()
FixPriceListingMapper -> Database: SELECT * FROM fixed_price_listing
Database --> FixPriceListingMapper: resultSet
FixPriceListingMapper -> allListings: create(title=resultSet.getString("title"), ...)
FixPriceListingMapper --> ListingController: allListings
@enduml
